The '''''Jehavey'ir''-type assault ship''', named after a [[Mando'a/Legends|Mando'a]] word for "''ambush''", was utilized by the [[Mandalorian Neo-Crusaders/Legends|Mandalorian Neo-Crusaders]] during the [[Mandalorian Wars]].<ref name="KOTOR:F" />

==Characteristics==
[[File:MandBattshp.jpg|thumb|left|140px|Assault ship stern]]
Similar in appearance to contemporary Mandalorian [[Kyramud-type battleship|''Kyramud''-type battleships]], as they were both based on [[Basilisk]] technology, the assault ships were propelled by five engines and were armed with medium double [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolasers]], heavy [[Ion cannon/Legends|ion cannons]] and super-heavy [[Concussion missile/Legends|concussion missile]] launchers. These assault ships always had their guns charged and ready to fire, even when in [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]], which allowed them to engage moments after arriving on the scene of battle. They lacked landing bays, and instead had special airlocks permitting the easy projection of troops toward a ship to be boarded.<ref name="KOTORCG" />

==History==
Ships of this kind participated in the [[Battle of Vanquo]],<ref name="KOTOR:F">''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic: Flashpoint]]''</ref> and later on, in the bombing of [[Serroco]] during the [[Battle of Serroco]].<ref name="SWKOTOR15">[[Knights of the Old Republic 15|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 15]]</ref> After a lengthy chase [[Neo-Crusader shock trooper|Neo-Crusader Shock Troopers]] from a Jehavey'ir-type assault ship took the Republic [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]] [[Courageous (Inexpugnable-class)|''Courageous'']].<ref name="KOTORCG" />

==Appearances==
*[[Knights of the Old Republic 8|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 8]] {{1st}}
*[[Knights of the Old Republic 15|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 15]]
